name: cbre-il-toolkit
description: CBRE's Industrial & Logistics toolkit for Claude — branded decks, account briefings, outreach angles, property longlists, warehouse-network maps, and on-brand writing.

plugins.name: cbre-il-toolkit
plugins.description: The CBRE Industrial & Logistics toolkit for Claude. Build polished, on-brand PowerPoint decks, turn a folder of property materials into an interactive longlist dashboard, draft I&L account briefings, surface evidence-backed reasons to reach out to a target company now as a ranked outreach-angles sheet with ready-to-send email hooks, map a company's warehouse and distribution network to an auditable Excel, and keep every word in the CBRE tone of voice.
